exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.suggestion_note: 250m easy row equivalent — light, movement priming only

exercises.name: Wall Ball
exercises.suggestion_note: CONDITIONAL: skip entirely if shoulder pain >2/10 on Wednesday. Substitute 10 goblet squats if omitted.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.suggestion_note: Goblet squat equivalent — easy tempo, mental rhythm focus

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.suggestion_note: Farmer's carry + lunges + burpees equivalent — hold light weight, focus on movement quality

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.suggestion_note: Light core activation — low fatigue, mental priming focus

notes: 20–25 min total at 50% effort max. This is mental rehearsal and pattern priming, not physical stress. Walk and visualise race-day transitions between each station. **SHOULDER CHECK**: Skip Wall Ball entirely if Wednesday simulation caused >2/10 pain; substitute 10 goblet squats instead. Stop immediately if anything feels heavy or sluggish—taper is active, fitness is banked. Focus: pacing targets, wall ball set/rest strategy, pre-race timing, warm-up routine.
